name: Spell & Learn Word Lab
description: Interactive vocabulary and spelling game with phonics, contextual clues, and drag-and-drop letter tiles for K-8 students

tools.name: start_word_challenge
tools.description: Start a new word challenge session with the specified mode and difficulty.

tools.name: get_word_progress
tools.description: Get the student's current word mastery progress and statistics.

tools.name: get_word_hint
tools.description: Get a hint for the current word challenge.
